title: Kaji in original 25 26
wikitext:
[]: Kaji in original 25/26             Quote Post by chaosakita » Fri May 20, 2011 11:21 pm This is one weird thing that I've never remember seen bought up in all the concurrency debates or any other ending discussion - Kaji somehow appears in the original 25/26. Why is this? He's been dead for weeks by the time of the episode. Yet...he is in here. Obviously, people who have been shown to be dead for a short while can appear in Instrumentality, but I doubt it's the case for someone like Kaji. Is this a glaring error that shows that the two endings can't be concurrent? What are your thoughts on this?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri May 20, 2011 11:36 pm EoE's magic Rei's provide the answer. We see them grab Misato, Ritsuko, the others, they presumably grab Asuka, and one shows up for Shinji at the end. Since magic Rei also appears in Episode 1, she clearly has time travel. As Kaji died in between Episode 1 and EoE, he was clearly snapped up by magic Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Fri May 20, 2011 11:38 pm Why would Rei pick Kaji out of all people? Did they ever even meet? Or did she read Shinji's mind or something? I am giving this issue way too much thought.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri May 20, 2011 11:42 pm Two schools of thought: 1) Reductio ad absurdium. Every last human being EVER was pulled into 3I, including all the dead ones. 2) 3I was about Shinji and so Rei grabbed dead people who still affected him. Also, I don't think she ever did meet Kaji, no.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat May 21, 2011 6:36 am Legendary wrote: Two schools of thought: 1) Reductio ad absurdium. Every last human being EVER was pulled into 3I, including all the dead ones. 2) 3I was about Shinji and so Rei grabbed dead people who still affected him.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat May 21, 2011 9:05 am He only appears after the text tells us instrumentality started, so the "Kaji" we see may be a representation of what he stands for in the memories of Shinji, Misato and co. Then again, how much time actually elapsed between ep 21 and 25'? His death may have beeb recent enough for Rei to come and grab him... There wasn't much of Kaji in EoE, was there?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sat May 21, 2011 10:21 am chaosakita wrote: Why would Rei pick Kaji out of all people?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat May 21, 2011 10:32 am Quite interesting this, been mean to start a thread about Eva characters who never actually have a conversation.

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Sat May 21, 2011 10:44 am Some time ago I have read some interesting theories about Evangelion and Qabalah. One of those is the meaning of the appearance of Ramiel in the serie. ( I'm translating on the fly, so please forgive any error or typo ) "Uriel or Ramiel is the first arkangel appearing in the serie, the angel similar to a diamond. Chief of the thunder. He has complete authority and power on all the souls that will have to get out of their graves in the Judgement day, and is strongly suspected to have destroy the masters of Sennarchieb. He came to challenge mankind after his slave and friend Shamshel died, and dying as well. In the Bible he was responsible of the tenth plague upon pharaon: the death of all the firstborns. His coming is very important: even arkangels are gonna fight. With his death souls of the dead will be free to get out of their graves before the Judgement's day, so Gendo and Misato will find Yui and Kaji in Tantai ( union of everything ) during the beginning of the Third Impact." Source: [url]http://www.scritturalternativa.it/category/svago/evangelion-cabala/page/3/[/url] Bye

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat May 21, 2011 12:51 pm What I said doesn't just include flashbacks but also... concepts in Shinji's head that he gave Kaji's face because he used to talk about them, a part of his psyche that is represented by Kaji - but it may as well be the actual Kaji, its kida ambiguous. He is in the final scene, awaiting Shinji, after all... As for EoE, you're right, I sort of forgot about the picture - then again, Rei is in it as well...

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat May 21, 2011 3:27 pm Kendrix wrote: Then again, how much time actually elapsed between ep 21 and 25'?

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sat May 21, 2011 10:06 pm It takes place inside Shinji's mind so Jesus and Santa can show up if he wants them to.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Sat May 21, 2011 10:31 pm I thought it took place in Instrumentality with everyone else's souls. No, I'm actually pretty sure the other people there are themselves.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun May 22, 2011 1:03 am Trajan wrote: It takes place inside Shinji's mind
